title: Ad
description: A Campaign Manager 360 ad. Ads define the creative content, delivery schedules, targeting rules, and placement assignments that control how advertising is served.

campaignId.description: Campaign ID of this ad. Required on insert.

advertiserId.description: Advertiser ID of this ad. Required on insert.

name.description: Name of this ad. Must be fewer than 256 characters.

active.description: Whether this ad is active. Cannot be true when archived is true.

archived.description: Whether this ad is archived. Cannot be true when active is true.

startTime.description: Date and time that this ad should start serving. Must be in the future for new ads.

endTime.description: Date and time that this ad should stop serving. Must be after startTime.

type.description: Type of ad. Required on insert.

dynamicClickTracker.description: Whether this ad is a dynamic click tracker. Read-only after insert.

eventTagOverrides.description: Event tag overrides for this ad.

kind.description: Identifies what kind of resource this is. Value is always dfareporting#ad.
